name: Integrated Financial Management Information System (IFMIS)
description: Government-wide financial management system for budget execution, procurement, and financial reporting. All National Treasury SOEs required to submit financial data via IFMIS.

name: State Corporations Advisory Committee (SCAC) Portal
description: Online portal for submission of Mwongozo Code compliance certificates, board composition returns, and performance contract reports.

name: Nairobi Securities Exchange (NSE) XBRL Reporting
description: XBRL-based financial reporting system for NSE-listed SOEs (KenGen, KPLC, Kenya Airways). Enables automated financial data submission to NSE and Capital Markets Authority.

name: Kenya Revenue Authority (KRA) iTax
description: Online tax filing and payment system for corporate income tax, VAT, PAYE, and withholding tax obligations.

name: Port Community System (PCS) — Mombasa
description: Single window system for cargo clearance at Mombasa Port, integrating KPA, Kenya Revenue Authority, Kenya Bureau of Standards, and shipping agents.

name: Energy Regulatory Commission (ERC) Reporting Portal
description: Online portal for submission of generation, transmission, and distribution data by energy sector SOEs (KenGen, KPLC, KPC).

name: Amadeus Altéa Passenger Service System
description: Core passenger service system for Kenya Airways covering reservations, check-in, departure control, and frequent flyer management.

name: SAP ERP System
description: Enterprise resource planning system covering finance, procurement, human resources, and asset management for KenGen and KPLC.
